name: feishu-ai-im-collab-assistant
description: Agent-Pilot: IM-driven office collaboration assistant for Feishu competition.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @agent-pilot/api" "npm run dev -w @agent-pilot/web"
scripts.dev:e2e: cross-env AGENT_LLM_MODE=mock OFFICE_ADAPTER=mock LARK_STATE_PATH=:memory: npm run dev
